Source: Amazon Q Business Doc History
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/qbusiness-ug/doc-history.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Q Business - Document History

## August 2025
- Agentic RAG Feature — Enhanced RAG with agentic workflows

## July 2025
- Clickable S3 link feature for source document access
- Relevancy tuning for search results
- Response customization for chat responses

## April 2025
- Anonymous access support for application environments

## March-April 2025
- Hallucination mitigation for chat interactions
- S3 bucket integration for web customization

## February 2025
- Microsoft Word Add-in integration
- Microsoft Outlook Add-in integration
- Chat orchestration controls and admin guardrails

## Key Features
- Agentic RAG, hallucination mitigation, semantic image extraction
- Microsoft Office integration (Word, Outlook)
- Slack, Teams, Smartsheet connectors
- IAM Federation, cross-region inference
- CloudWatch monitoring integration
